delegator.description: Address that approves verification key update on the core Railgun contract

owner.description: Address that proposes verification key update on the core Railgun contract

state.description: 0 = SETTING (owner can upload new keys to the contract), 1 = WAITING (all update functions are locked until delegator approves), 2 = COMMITTING (owner can push the keys to the actual verifier)

receivedPermissions.description: propose verification key update (i.e. zk circuit logic update) on the key contract.

state.description: 0 = SETTING (owner can upload new keys to the contract), 1 = WAITING (all update functions are locked until delegator approves), 2 = COMMITTING (owner can push the keys to the actual verifier)

receivedPermissions.description: approve verification key update (i.e. zk circuit logic update) on the key contract.
approve verification key update (i.e. zk circuit logic update) on the key contract.
set zk verification key to upgrade the verifier circuit.

grantedPermissions.description: Selector 0x2ec0f359 is function setVerificationKey on the main railgun contract.

receivedPermissions.description: propose verification key update (i.e. zk circuit logic update) on the key contract.

totalShielded.description: Total number of deposits into Railgun, all tokens combined.

totalUnshielded.description: Total number of withdrawals from Railgun, all tokens combined.
